Cost Per Conversion (page performance)
ROAS (overall page and ad performance)
Cost Per Click (general ad performance)
CTR (ad quality and call to action)
CPV or CPM (overall campaign quality)
Watch time and View rate (for video ads)
PRIMARY STATS TO CHECK
Never stop improving… and scale big!

Review ads, then ad groups, then campaigns
Pause ads at 3x desired cost per result
Increase winning campaign budget by 10-25% each week
Adjust target CPA bids (or remove max CPA)
BIDS AND BUDGETING
Drill down in reports (pages, time, age, etc)
Test multiple new audiences (ad groups) daily
• Vary your placements, topics, keywords
• Create keyword variations (negatives, etc)
• Refine audience by layering targeting
• Try wider audiences with basic interests
• Test custom segments based on activity
Regularly create new ad creative (all formats)
ADS AND AUDIENCES
MANAGEMENT AND
OPTIMIZATION CHECKLIST
